content: Vite 8.0.16 (published 2026-06-01) requires Node.js 20.19+ or 22.12+. Scaffold command: npm create vite@latest <app-name> -- --template react. vite.config.js default: import { defineConfig } from 'vite'; import react from '@vitejs/plugin-react'; export default defineConfig({ plugins: [react()] }). @vitejs/plugin-react v6.0.2. Env vars prefixed VITE_ exposed via import.meta.env; others hidden. .env.local is git-ignored by default. Critical: VITE_ vars are bundled into client code at build time - do not put true secrets in them.
